get.description: Returns whether the AI assistant is enabled, configured, and ready to serve requests.

Add domain to a set via geosite

get.summary: Query IPInfo API for IP details
Query RIPE network info for IP
Check which sets match a domain
List all targeted domains from enabled sets

post.description: Schedules an out-of-band check for a domain that is already present in the watchdog list. The domain may be passed as a bare host or a full URL; both forms are matched against the stored list.
Turns the watchdog off and persists the change in the configuration. No further domain checks are performed until it is re-enabled.
Adds a domain to the list of monitored targets. Duplicates (including different URL forms that resolve to the same host) are rejected. The configuration is persisted and pushed to running services.
post.summary: Add a domain to the watchdog list

delete.description: Removes a domain from the monitored list. The path parameter may be either the exact stored value or the bare host extracted from a stored URL.
delete.summary: Remove a domain from the watchdog list

404.description: domain not found in watchdog list

post.description: Turns the watchdog on and persists the change in the configuration. Monitoring of configured domains resumes on the next tick.

get.description: Returns the current enabled state of the watchdog and the status of each monitored domain (last check, failures, cooldown, matched set, etc.).

fake_per_seg_count.description: Number of fake packets per segment (default 1)
Number of fake packets per segment (default 1)

count.description: Number of packet copies to send (original is dropped)

to.description: ID of next set to use after this set is detected as blocked for a destination

timestamp_decrease.description: Amount to decrease TCP timestamp option

max.description: threshold max (KB), if 0 or eq MinKB -> uses MinKB

dport_filter.description: comma separated list of ports and port ranges, e.g. "80,443,5222"
can be a comma separated list of ports and port ranges, e.g. "80,443,1000-2000"

fake_payload_file.description: "" = zero fill, "@quic_initial" = generate fresh QUIC Initial per packet, "@preset:quic1"/"@preset:quic2" = bundled presets, otherwise capture filename relative to config dir (e.g. "captures/quic_youtube_com.bin")
